message:
feat(ufunc): add meshgrid indexing, split_at, edge case tests, and total_cmp root sorting

Add meshgrid_indexing() with 'xy'/'ij' parameter support; meshgrid()
now delegates to meshgrid_indexing with default 'xy'. Add split_at()
for index-based array splitting (np.split with indices). Replace
partial_cmp with total_cmp in polynomial root sorting for deterministic
NaN handling. Add edge case tests for tensordot axes=0 (outer product),
tensordot axes exceeding dims, concatenate with empty arrays,
concatenate all-empty, and clip scalar. Update beads issue tracker
with new closed issues (meshgrid indexing, hsplit/vsplit/dsplit,
split_at, edge case tests) and in-progress multi-axis reduce_var/std.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
